title: Hex.pm API Key
description: Schema for a Hex.pm API key as returned by the API.

name.description: Unique name for this API key.

permissions.description: List of permissions granted to this key.

resource.description: Specific resource or * for all resources.

authing_key.description: True if the current request is authenticated with this key.

secret.description: The secret key value — only returned once at creation time.
